title: LIMM Works Q&A Expansion Pack v10.1

global_rules.tone: Warm, energetic, genuine, professional. Enthusiastic about helping clients create their dream home where contextually appropriate. Not cute, not overly sweet, not robotic, not overly formal, not pushy.
global_rules.approved_phrase: We’d love to help create your dream home.
hard_forbidden: team will review the next step properly
reply_shape: keep to 1-2 short WhatsApp-friendly sentences where possible
do not ask for information already received

codex_instruction.instruction: Convert this JSON pack into the production Q&A knowledge array and integrate it into QA Centre as the Q&A Expansion Pack. Do not reduce scenario count. Do not enable auto-pricing, auto-booking, or voice transcription. Keep QA Centre simulation-only.
acceptance: commercial scenarios do not require or use dream-home phrase
home/design scenarios use dream-home phrase where appropriate
frustrated/recovery scenarios do not use dream-home phrase
QA Centre is simulation-only and cannot send WhatsApp

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Hi, thanks for contacting LIMM Works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know what type of property this is and what renovation works you’re planning?

client_examples: I found you from your website
required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Thanks for contacting LIMM Works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know what type of property this is and what renovation works you’re planning?

client_examples: 你好，请问你们有做装修吗？
required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 你好，感谢联系 LIMM Works。我们很期待帮您打造理想的家。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？主要想装修哪些部分？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 你好，感谢联系 LIMM Works。我们很期待帮您打造理想的家。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？主要想装修哪些部分？
scenarios.next_action: Ask property type and scope in Mandarin

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review this, but the cost depends on the property type, size, and actual scope. May I know what renovation works you’re planning?
We can help review the rough scope first, but the cost will depend on property type, size, materials and actual works involved. May I know what areas you’re planning to renovate?
We can review the scope first before advising the next step. May I know the property type and what works are included?
We usually review based on the actual scope rather than fixed packages, so the proposal can match the property and works needed. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?

We can help review the kitchen works. The cost depends on whether it includes carpentry only, or also hacking, tiling, plumbing, electrical and countertop works. May I know what you’re planning for the kitchen?

We can help review the toilet works. The cost depends on whether it includes hacking, waterproofing, tiling, plumbing, sanitary fittings and electrical works. May I know what works you’re planning to include?
We can help review a whole-house renovation. The cost depends on the property type, size, existing condition and scope. May I know if this is for a HDB, condo, landed property or commercial unit?
We can help review condo renovation works. The cost depends on the unit size, scope, materials and condo management requirements. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?
We can help review HDB renovation works. The cost depends on the flat type, existing condition and scope. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?
Landed renovation cost depends heavily on the scope, existing condition, site access and whether A&A works are involved. May I know which areas you’re planning to change?
Carpentry cost depends on the size, internal layout, laminate, hardware and installation details. May I know what carpentry items you’re planning?
Wardrobe cost depends on the size, door type, internal compartments, laminate and hardware. May I know the approximate width and the type of wardrobe you’re looking at?
TV console cost depends on the length, design, storage, laminate and whether feature wall works are included. May I know the approximate size and style you’re looking for?
For wet kitchen extension, the cost depends on the existing layout, structure, drainage, roofing and approval requirements. May I know if this is for a landed property?
Photos can help us understand the condition, but we’ll still need the scope and preferably a floor plan to review properly. May I know what works you want to include?
scenarios.next_action: Ask scope and floor plan if available

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, the floor plan is helpful for review. You may also send site photos and a short scope of works so we can understand what needs to be included.
We can help review a practical scope based on your needs, but we should first understand the property type and works required before advising the next step.
We usually review based on the actual scope and specifications rather than promo packages. May I know what type of renovation works you’re planning?
We can review and compare based on the actual scope and specifications, because quotations can differ a lot depending on what is included. May I know what works are listed?
Renovation cost can vary a lot depending on scope, materials, site condition and what is included. If you send the quotation or scope, we can help review the differences more clearly.
We’ll need to understand the property type, size and actual scope first before advising the next step. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?
It depends on the actual scope and site condition. May I know what works you need done so we can understand whether it is a small scope or a larger renovation?
We can review the scope against your target budget, but it depends on the property type, size and works included. May I know which areas you want to prioritise?
Payment stages are usually confirmed together with the formal quotation and scope. May I know what renovation works you’re planning first?
我们可以帮您了解厨房装修的范围，不过费用会根据屋型、尺寸和实际施工内容而定。请问厨房是只做橱柜，还是包括拆除、地砖、水电和台面？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 我们可以帮您了解厨房装修的范围，不过费用会根据屋型、尺寸和实际施工内容而定。请问厨房是只做橱柜，还是包括拆除、地砖、水电和台面？

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 我们通常会根据实际装修范围来评估，而不是直接用固定配套。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？主要想装修哪些部分？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 我们通常会根据实际装修范围来评估，而不是直接用固定配套。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？主要想装修哪些部分？
scenarios.next_action: Ask property type and scope in Mandarin

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review HDB renovation works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?
Yes, we can help review BTO renovation works. May I know the flat type and which areas you’re planning to work on?
HDB wall hacking depends on whether the wall can be approved for hacking under HDB rules. May I know which wall or area you’re planning to change?
Some HDB renovation works require approval, especially hacking and certain wet works. May I know what works you’re planning?
Yes, we can help review toilet renovation works. For HDB, waterproofing, hacking and wet works need to follow the relevant requirements. May I know what you want to change?
Overlay may be possible depending on the existing tile condition, height, and area involved. May I know if this is for the floor, wall, kitchen or toilet?
Moving a kitchen will depend on layout, plumbing, drainage and approval requirements. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Window works may require the right approval and approved contractor requirements depending on the property type. May I know if this is HDB or condo?
Yes, we can help review resale HDB renovation works. May I know the flat type and which areas you’re planning to renovate?
Yes, we can help review 4-room HDB renovation works. May I know if you’re planning a full renovation or selected areas only?
Yes, we can help review 5-room HDB renovation works. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?
Yes, we can help review HDB carpentry works. May I know which carpentry items you need, such as kitchen cabinets, wardrobe, TV console or storage?
Yes, we can help review toilet waterproofing works. May I know whether this is part of a full toilet renovation or waterproofing repair only?
This depends on whether the wall is approved for hacking and the property type. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Combining rooms may be possible, but it depends on the wall type and approval requirements. May I know if this is for HDB, condo or landed?
Yes, we can help review an open kitchen layout. May I know if this is for a HDB, condo or landed property?
For works that require approval, we should not proceed before the necessary approval is cleared. May I know what works you’re planning?
HDB 敲墙需要看墙体是否可以申请和批准，不能直接确认一定可以。请问您想改的是哪一面墙或哪个区域？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: HDB 敲墙需要看墙体是否可以申请和批准，不能直接确认一定可以。请问您想改的是哪一面墙或哪个区域？

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review condo renovation works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate?

client_examples: 公寓需要管理处批准吗？
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: For condo renovation, we may need to follow the management renovation rules, including work hours, lift protection and approval requirements. May I know what works you’re planning?
This depends on the condo management rules and permitted renovation hours. May I know which condo and what type of works are involved?
Noisy works will depend on the management rules and approved work hours. May I know what noisy works are involved, such as hacking or drilling?
Most condo managements require lift and common area protection for renovation works. May I know which condo and what scope you’re planning?
Some condos require a renovation deposit before works start. This depends on the management rules. May I know which condo this is for?
Condo wall hacking depends on the wall type, management approval and structural considerations. May I know which wall or area you’re planning to change?
Yes, we can help review condo toilet renovation works. May I know whether you’re planning a full toilet renovation or selected changes only?
Moving wet areas can be sensitive and depends on plumbing, waterproofing and approval requirements. May I know what area you’re planning to move?

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review condo kitchen works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know if you’re planning carpentry only or a full kitchen renovation?
Yes, we can help review condo carpentry works. May I know which items you need, such as kitchen cabinets, wardrobe, TV console or storage?
We’ll need to check the scope, site condition, management requirements and team schedule first. May I know what works you need done?
This depends on the condo management rules and booking requirements. May I know which condo and what works are planned?
Renovation working hours depend on the condo management rules. May I know what type of works you need and whether they involve noise?
Some condo managements require renovation insurance or documents before approval. May I know which condo this is for?
We can help review what documents may be needed, depending on the scope and condo requirements. May I know what works are planned?
Yes, we can help review penthouse renovation works. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate and whether any outdoor or roof terrace works are involved?

client_examples: 公寓装修需要管理处批准吗？
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 一般公寓装修需要按照管理处的装修规定，包括施工时间、电梯保护和申请要求。请问您主要想做哪些装修项目？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 一般公寓装修需要按照管理处的装修规定，包括施工时间、电梯保护和申请要求。请问您主要想做哪些装修项目？

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review backyard extension works, but the feasibility depends on site condition, structure and approval requirements. May I know what you’re planning to build or extend?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review shelter works, but the design and approval requirements depend on the property and location. May I know where you’re planning to build the shelter?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review car porch works. May I know if you’re planning flooring, roofing/shelter, drainage, gate area or a full redesign?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review façade improvement works. For landed properties, it’s better to check the existing frontage, structure and any approval considerations first.

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review roof works, but this depends on the roof condition, access, waterproofing and structural considerations. May I know what issue or change you’re planning?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: URA requirements depend on the type of landed/A&A works and the extent of changes. May I know what additions or alterations you’re planning?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: BCA or structural requirements may apply depending on the scope. We’ll need to review the existing layout and proposed works first.

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Adding a balcony may involve structural and approval requirements. May I know the property type and where you’re planning to add it?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Second-floor extension needs proper review of structure, planning controls and approval requirements. May I know the existing property type and what area you want to extend?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Changing a staircase can involve layout, structure and approval considerations. May I know what you’re planning to change about the staircase?

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review inter-terrace renovation works. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know the main areas you’re planning to change?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review semi-D renovation works. May I know if this is mainly interior renovation, façade improvement, extension, or A&A works?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review corner terrace renovation works. May I know which areas you’re planning to renovate or extend?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review old landed house renovation works. For older houses, site condition, waterproofing, drainage and structure should be reviewed properly.

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review leakage-related works, but we’ll need to understand where the leak is coming from and the site condition. You may send photos or a short video first.

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can help review drainage works. May I know where the drainage issue is and whether it is at the car porch, backyard, side lane or roof area?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review waterproofing works. May I know which area has the issue, such as toilet, roof, balcony, wall or yard?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Attic works need proper review of structure, height, access and approval requirements. May I know what you’re planning to use the attic for?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Structural works need proper review and may require the right professional assessment and approval. May I know what structural changes you’re considering?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Possible, but it depends on whether the wall is structural and the site condition. May I know which wall or area you’re planning to change?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: A full landed rebuild is a major scope and will need proper review of planning, structure and approval requirements. May I know if you’re looking at rebuild or renovation/A&A?

scenarios.category: E. Landed / A&A / extension / roof / façade
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: landed / A&A 工程是否需要申请，要看实际改动范围、结构和相关规定。请问您主要想改哪些区域？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: landed / A&A 工程是否需要申请，要看实际改动范围、结构和相关规定。请问您主要想改哪些区域？

client_examples: Wet kitchen extension 可以做吗？
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 可以，我们可以帮您先了解 wet kitchen extension 的范围，不过需要看现有格局、结构、排水和申请要求。请问这是 landed 吗？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 可以，我们可以帮您先了解 wet kitchen extension 的范围，不过需要看现有格局、结构、排水和申请要求。请问这是 landed 吗？

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review office renovation works. May I know what areas of the office you’re planning to renovate or fit out?
Yes, we can help review shop renovation works. May I know what type of shop this is and what works you’re planning?
Yes, we can help review commercial renovation works. May I know what type of commercial unit this is and the main scope?
We can help review reinstatement works. May I know the unit type, required reinstatement scope and timeline?
Yes, we can help review partition and meeting room works. May I know the office size and how many rooms or areas you need?
We can help review office electrical works as part of the renovation scope. May I know what electrical points or changes are needed?
This depends on building management rules, work type and noise restrictions. May I know what works need to be done after office hours?
可以，我们可以帮您了解办公室装修或 fit-out 的范围。请问主要想装修哪些区域，比如会议室、办公区、partition 或电工？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 可以，我们可以帮您了解办公室装修或 fit-out 的范围。请问主要想装修哪些区域，比如会议室、办公区、partition 或电工？

client_examples: Can you do design for me?
required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review the design direction. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know what type of property this is and which areas you’re planning to renovate?

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review the design theme. We’d love to help create your dream home. May I know what style you prefer and which areas you’re renovating?
Yes, we can help review the concept direction. You may send us the floor plan, site photos and any reference images first.
Yes, we can help review the interior design direction together with the renovation scope. May I know what type of property this is?
We can review design and visualisation needs based on the project scope. May I know which areas you want to visualise or renovate?

required_reply_points: include approved dream-home enthusiasm phrase where natural
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can help review the kitchen design direction. We’d love to help create your dream home, starting with the kitchen. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Yes, we can advise suitable materials based on the style, usage and budget expectations. May I know which areas you’re selecting materials for?
Yes, we can help review a modern design direction. You may send us reference images you like, and we’ll understand the scope from there.
Yes, we can help review a Mediterranean-inspired design direction. You may send us reference images and the floor plan so we can understand the space.
Yes, we can help review the layout planning. May I know what type of property this is and which areas you want to improve?
Yes, we can help review storage ideas based on your lifestyle and space. May I know which areas need more storage?

client_examples: Can make my home look bigger?

Yes, we can help consider practical layout, safety and storage needs for children or elderly family members. May I know who will be staying in the home?

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check a suitable time for a project review. May I know the property type, rough location and main scope first?

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can review whether a site visit is needed after understanding the scope. May I know what type of property this is and what works you’re planning?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check the schedule, but we’ll first need the property type, rough location and main scope. May I know what works you’re planning?

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check availability for a project review. May I know the property type, rough location and main scope first?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check a suitable timing, but we’ll first need to understand the scope and location. May I know what works you need help with?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can start by reviewing the property type, scope, floor plan and photos first. From there, we can advise whether a project review appointment is needed.

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check if a site review is suitable. May I have the property type, rough location and main works you’re planning?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: We can check a suitable time for a project review. May I know which areas of the condo you’re planning to renovate?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can check a suitable site review timing after understanding the scope. May I know the property type and location?

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: The address or postal code is helpful when arranging a project review or checking location. You can share the postal code first if preferred.

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, postal code is a good start for checking the location. We may ask for the full address later if a project review is arranged.

scenarios.category: I. Appointment / site visit / location / postal
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 可以，我们可以先了解适合的 project review 时间。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？也麻烦您提供大概地点和主要装修范围。
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 可以，我们可以先了解适合的 project review 时间。请问这是 HDB、公寓、landed 还是商业单位？也麻烦您提供大概地点和主要装修范围。

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: The timeline depends on the property type, scope, approvals and site condition. May I know what works you’re planning?
We can check the timeline, but it depends on the scope, site condition and team availability. May I know what works you need done?
Completion time depends on the scope, approvals, materials and site condition. May I know which areas you’re renovating?
We can review the timeline, but rushing depends on the actual scope and site condition. May I know your target completion date and the works involved?
Understood. We’ll need to review the scope and timeline carefully. May I know your target move-in date and which works are most urgent?
We can check the feasibility, but it depends on the scope, approvals, materials and schedule. May I know what works you’re planning?
The duration depends on whether it includes hacking, tiling, plumbing, electrical and carpentry works. May I know what works are included?
开工时间要看装修范围、现场情况、材料和团队安排。请问您主要想做哪些工程？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 开工时间要看装修范围、现场情况、材料和团队安排。请问您主要想做哪些工程？

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Possible, but it depends on whether the wall is structural and the approval requirements. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Columns are usually structural, so this needs proper review before any advice. May I know the property type and where the column is located?
Beams are structural elements, so we cannot confirm without proper review. May I know what change you’re trying to achieve?
Moving a toilet depends on plumbing, waterproofing, drainage and approval requirements. May I know the property type and where you want to move it?
Moving a kitchen depends on layout, plumbing, drainage and approval requirements. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Changing a staircase can involve layout, structure and approval considerations. May I know what you’re planning to change?
We’ll need to review the scope and approval requirements first. Approval depends on the property type, authorities or management rules, and the actual works involved.
For works that require approval, we should wait for the necessary approval before starting. May I know what works you’re planning?
Yes, we can help review wet works, but requirements depend on the area, waterproofing, plumbing and property type. May I know what wet works are needed?
Drainage changes need proper review because they affect falls, waterproofing and connection points. May I know which area the drainage is in?
This depends on the wall type, property rules and approval requirements. May I know if this is HDB, condo or landed?
Structural walls cannot be treated like normal partition walls. This needs proper review and approval considerations before any advice.
We can help review roof works, but the scope depends on access, waterproofing, structure and existing condition. May I know what roof issue or change you’re planning?
Extension works may require proper approval depending on the scope and property type. We should review the works properly before advising the next step.
厕所位置更改需要看排水、防水、管道和申请要求。请问这是 HDB、公寓还是 landed？
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 厕所位置更改需要看排水、防水、管道和申请要求。请问这是 HDB、公寓还是 landed？

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 批准要看屋型、工程范围、相关部门或管理处规定，不能直接保证。我们需要先了解实际装修内容。
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 批准要看屋型、工程范围、相关部门或管理处规定，不能直接保证。我们需要先了解实际装修内容。

scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Material selection depends on the area and usage. For carpentry, we can advise suitable board, laminate and hardware options based on the design and budget expectations.
Laminate choice depends on the style, durability needs and usage area. You may send reference images if you have a look in mind.
Yes, quartz can be considered for countertops depending on the design, usage and budget expectations. May I know if this is for kitchen or another area?
Sintered stone can be considered for certain countertop or feature applications. We’ll need to review the design and usage area first.
Yes, solid surface can be considered, especially where a seamless look is preferred. May I know which area you’re planning it for?
Yes, hardware options can be discussed based on your preference and budget expectations. May I know which carpentry items you’re planning?
For wet or moisture-prone areas, we can advise more suitable materials and details, but no carpentry should be treated as fully waterproof. May I know where it will be installed?
Yes, we can help review wardrobe and kitchen cabinet works. May I know the area, approximate size and the style you’re looking for?

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: LIMM Works is currently not GST registered, so GST is not added to our quotation.

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, we can provide proper quotation and invoice documents for confirmed works.

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Payment terms will be stated clearly in the formal quotation. We’ll first need to understand the confirmed scope of works.

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Payment arrangement can be discussed during quotation review, but it depends on the confirmed scope and project terms.

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Yes, LIMM Works is a registered company. May I know what renovation works you’re planning?

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: Warranty terms depend on the type of works and will be clarified in the quotation or agreement. May I know what scope you’re looking at?

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: You can view some of our past works here: https://www.instagram.com/limmworks/. If you have a similar style in mind, you may send us reference images too.

scenarios.category: M. Company / payment / GST / warranty / portfolio

client_examples: 我已经发了，为什么又问？
scenarios.ideal_reply_en: 不好意思，我会先检查您之前发的资料，避免重复问同样的问题。
scenarios.ideal_reply_zh: 不好意思，我会先检查您之前发的资料，避免重复问同样的问题。
